mapper.select:
select asu.id, asu.schedule_id, asu.staff_id, DATE_FORMAT(asu.work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as work_date, asu.result_status, asu.late_minutes, asu.early_minutes, asu.ot_minutes, asu.allowance_amount, asu.is_exception, asu.audit_remark, asu.start_time, asu.end_time,
si.name as staffName, si.images as staffImages,
di.dept_name, poi.name as positionName
from attendance_summary asu left join staff_info si on (si.id = asu.staff_id) left join dept_info di on (di.id = si.dept_id) left join position_info poi on (poi.id = si.position_id) where 1 = 1
AND si.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.staffName},'%')
AND di.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.deptName},'%')
AND asu.result_status = #{queryForm.resultStatus}
order by asu.work_date desc
